items.text: We undertake substantial efforts and expend significant resources to protect our systems and sensitive or confidential data and information.
items.rationale: Generic cybersecurity boilerplate about protecting systems and data, no specific new threat or incident described.

items.text: Our success depends on our ability to innovate effectively and respond to our competitors’ initiatives.
items.rationale: Generic statement about needing to innovate and respond to competitors, lacks specific new risk detail.

items.text: Consolidations and strategic relationships in the independent agent channel in our Personal Lines business have increased competition and could continue to do so.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new competitive dynamic: consolidation among independent agents in Personal Lines increasing competition.

items.text: Historically, the auto and property insurance markets have been described as cyclical, with periods of relatively strong profitability being followed by increased pricing competition among insurers.
items.rationale: Provides additional context/detail on cyclical pricing competition, expanding on an existing competitive risk theme.

items.text: For additional discussion of statutory profit limits, see Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations – II.
items.rationale: Cross-reference to another section of the filing, not a risk statement itself.

items.text: Financial Condition in the Annual Report.
items.rationale: Continuation of cross-reference citation, not substantive risk content.

items.text: In addition, laws in certain jurisdictions mandate that insurance companies pay assessments in a number of circumstances, including potentially material assessments to pay claims upon the insolvency of other insurance companies or to cover losses in government-provided insurance programs for high-risk auto and homeowners’ coverages.
items.rationale: Identifies a specific and material financial risk: mandatory assessments for insolvencies or high-risk coverage programs.

items.text: We use third-party labor to meet a portion of our staffing needs.
items.rationale: Introduces a new specific operational dependency on third-party labor for staffing needs.

items.text: Intellectual property rights could affect our competitiveness and our business operations.
items.rationale: Vague, generic statement about intellectual property affecting competitiveness without specific details or new facts.
